title: Instant Loan Temptation
fullRewardHint: Answer all {{total}} choices correctly to earn the full reward.
reflectionPrompts: How can you verify the legitimacy of digital lending platforms?
What red flags should you watch for in instant loan offers?

stages.prompt: Scenario: An app offers 'Instant loan in 5 minutes.' What should you do first?

options.label: Check legitimacy and terms
options.reflection: Correct! Verifying legitimacy and understanding terms is essential before any loan agreement.

options.label: Accept immediately
options.reflection: Accepting immediately without checking details can lead to hidden risks and unfavorable terms.

options.label: Apply for the maximum amount offered
options.reflection: Applying without checking terms can expose you to unfavorable conditions and excessive debt.

options.label: Share with friends who might need money
options.reflection: Sharing unverified loan offers can spread potentially risky financial products to others.

stages.prompt: Why might instant loan offers be risky despite their convenience?

options.label: They are always government-approved
options.reflection: Instant loans are not necessarily government-approved and may come from unregulated sources.

options.label: They offer the best terms due to competition
options.reflection: Fast loans don't necessarily offer the best terms; speed often comes with higher costs.

options.label: They require extensive documentation
options.reflection: Instant loans typically promise minimal documentation, not extensive paperwork.

options.label: They often have hidden fees and high interest rates
options.reflection: Exactly! Speed-focused lenders may hide costs that significantly increase the loan burden.

stages.prompt: What should be your priority when evaluating a digital lending platform?

options.label: Focus on the speed of disbursement
options.reflection: Speed is not a priority compared to verifying legitimacy and terms of the loan.

options.label: Check only the interest rate
options.reflection: While interest rate matters, verifying legitimacy and all terms is more important than just the rate.

options.label: Verify the platform's license and regulatory compliance
options.reflection: Perfect! Ensuring the platform is licensed and regulated protects you from fraudulent operators.

options.label: Look for celebrity endorsements
options.reflection: Celebrity endorsements don't guarantee legitimacy or favorable terms for borrowers.

stages.prompt: What is the relationship between loan processing speed and risk?

options.label: Faster loans are always safer
options.reflection: Speed doesn't correlate with safety; fast loans can hide significant risks.

options.label: Speed often correlates with higher risk in digital lending
options.reflection: Yes! Fast loans often come with less scrutiny and potentially hidden risks.

options.label: Speed has no bearing on loan risk
options.reflection: Speed can indicate less scrutiny and potentially more risk, especially with digital platforms.

options.label: Slow processing always means high risk
options.reflection: Processing time alone doesn't determine risk; verification and terms are more important.

stages.prompt: How should you approach promotional offers from digital lending apps?

options.label: Carefully evaluate terms before accepting any offer
options.reflection: Excellent! Thorough evaluation helps identify potential risks and ensures suitable borrowing.

options.label: Accept if the initial offer looks attractive
options.reflection: Initial offers might not represent the full terms; comprehensive evaluation is necessary.

options.label: Trust the app rating on the store
options.reflection: App ratings don't guarantee fair lending terms or protection against hidden risks.

options.label: Focus only on the approval speed
options.reflection: Approval speed is less important than understanding the terms and conditions of the loan.
